languages.text: {n}Вокруг вас — дюжины людей, одетых во что-то, отдаленно напоминающее гвардейскую униформу. Домотканные рубища прикрыты деревянными доспехами, копирующими противоосколочную броню. Многочисленные трофеи — шкуры, кости, куски огромных растений и кора — покрывают их одежды. Дикари щеголяют увечьями и культями, однако у многих они прикрыты примитивными протезами. То и дело кто-то из людей начинает скалиться, словно зверь, или нервно хватается за оружие.{/n}

{n}You are surrounded by dozens of people dressed in what only vaguely resembles Astra Militarum uniform. Homespun cloth is overlaid with wooden plates, mimicking Imperial flak armour. These clothes are adorned with numerous trophies: pelts, bones, bark, and remnants of giant plants. The savages flaunt their scars and stumps, yet many are fitted with primitive prosthetics. From time to time, someone in the group bares their teeth like a beast, while others nervously grip their weapons.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вокруг вас — дюжины людей, одетых во что-то, отдаленно напоминающее гвардейскую униформу. Домотканные рубища прикрыты деревянными доспехами, копирующими противоосколочную броню. Многочисленные трофеи — шкуры, кости, куски огромных растений и кора — покрывают их одежды. Дикари щеголяют увечьями и культями, однако у многих они прикрыты примитивными протезами. То и дело кто-то из людей начинает скалиться, словно зверь, или нервно хватается за оружие.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You are surrounded by dozens of people dressed in what only remotely resembles the Astra Militarum uniform. Homespun shrouds are overlaid with wooden plates, mimicking Imperial flak armour. Their clothes is covered with numerous trophies: pelts, bones, remnants of giant plants, and bark. These savages flaunt their scars and stumps, yet many are fitted with primitive prosthetics. From time to time, someone in the group bares their teeth like a beast, while others nervously grip their weapons.{/n}

{n}You are surrounded by dozens of people dressed in what only vaguely resembles an Astra Militarum uniform. Homespun cloth is overlaid with wooden plates, mimicking Imperial flak armour. These clothes are adorned with numerous trophies: pelts, bones, bark, and remnants of giant plants. The savages flaunt their scars and stumps, yet many are fitted with primitive prosthetics. From time to time, someone in the group bares their teeth like a beast, while others nervously grip their weapons.{/n}

{n}You are surrounded by dozens of people dressed in what only remotely resembles Astra Militarum uniform. What marks these people out as different from the valiant Guardsmen you are familiar with are the many trophies they wear — pelts, bones, bark, and pieces of huge plants. Many of those present have been equipped with primitive prosthetics, while others boast maimed limbs and stumps. From time to time, someone in the group bares their teeth like a beast, while others nervously grip their weapons.{/n}

languages.text: {n}数十人の人々が、帝国防衛軍の軍服を模倣したような服装をしてあなたを取り囲んでいます。勇敢なグार्デンズマンとは異なるのは、彼らが身につけている多くのトロフィーです。毛皮、骨、樹皮、そして巨大な植物の破片です。その中には、原始的な義肢を身につけている者もいれば、傷ついた肢や截骨した肢を誇示している者もいます。時折、その集団の中で、誰かが獣のように牙を剥き、また、他の人たちは武器を握りしめて不安そうにしています。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are surrounded by dozens of people dressed in what only remotely resembles Astra Militarum uniform. What marks these people out as different from the valiant Guardsmen you are familiar with are the many trophies they wear — pelts, bones, bark, and pieces of huge plants. Many of those present have been equipped with primitive prosthetics, while others boast maimed limbs and stumps. From time to time, someone in the group bares their teeth like a beast, while others nervously grip their weapons.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}数十人の人々が、Astra Militarumの軍服を模倣したような服装をしてあなたを取り囲んでいます。勇敢なグार्デンズマンとは異なるのは、彼らが身につけている多くのトロフィーです。毛皮、骨、樹皮、そして巨大な植物の破片です。その中には、原始的な義肢を身につけている者もいれば、傷ついた肢や截骨した肢を誇示している者もいます。時折、その集団の中で、誰かが獣のように牙を剥き、また、他の人たちは武器を握りしめて不安そうにしています。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du bist von Dutzenden von Personen umgeben, deren Kleidung nur entfernt an eine Uniform des Astra Militarum erinnert. Schlichter Stoff ist mit Holzplatten verstärkt, die eine imperiale Armaplast-Rüstung imitieren. Die Kleidung ist mit verschiedenen Trophäen verziert: Pelzen, Knochen, Rinde und den Resten riesiger Pflanzen. Die Wilden stellen ihre Narben und Armstümpfe zur Schau, aber viele von ihnen haben primitive Prothesen. Von Zeit zu Zeit fletscht jemand in der Gruppe wie ein wildes Tier seine Zähne, während andere nervös nach ihren Waffen greifen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are surrounded by dozens of people dressed in what only vaguely resembles an Astra Militarum uniform. From time to time, someone in the group bares their teeth like a beast, while others nervously grip their weapons.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous êtes {mf|cerné|cernée} par des dizaines d'individus revêtus de ce qui ressemble vaguement à l'uniforme de l'Astra Militarum. Leurs vêtements rustiques sont recouverts de plaques de bois imitant l'armure blindée des impériaux et ornés de nombreux trophées : peaux, os, écorce et restes de plantes géantes. Les sauvages ont beau exhiber leurs cicatrices et moignons, certains sont équipés de prothèses primitives. De temps à autre, un membre du groupe montre les dents comme une bête sauvage, alors que d'autres s'agrippent nerveusement à leurs armes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are surrounded by dozens of people dressed in what only vaguely resembles an Astra Militarum uniform. Homespun cloth is overlaid with wooden plates, mimicking Imperial flak armour. These clothes are adorned with numerous trophies: pelts, bones, bark, and remnants of giant plants. The savages flaunt their scars and stumps, yet many are fitted with primitive prosthetics. From time to time, someone in the group bares their teeth like a beast, while others nervously grip their weapons.{/n}

Leurs vêtements rustiques sont recouverts de plaques de bois imitant l'armure blindée des impériaux et ornés de nombreux trophées : peaux, os, écorce et restes de plantes géantes. Les sauvages ont beau exhiber leurs cicatrices et moignons, certains sont équipés de prothèses primitives. languages.text: {n}Te rodean decenas de personas que visten algo que guarda un cierto parecido con los uniformes del Astra Militarum. Tela casera superpuesta a placas de madera a imitación de la armadura antimetralla Imperial. La ropa está adornada con diferentes trofeos: pieles huesos, corteza y los restos de plantas gigantes. Los salvajes hacen alarde de cicatrices y muñones, pero muchos están equipados con prótesis primitivas. De vez en cuando, alguno enseña los dientes como si fuera una bestia, mientras que otros empuñan nerviosos sus armas.{/n}

Los salvajes hacen alarde de cicatrices y muñones, pero muchos están equipados con prótesis primitivas. languages.text: {n}Astra Militarum üniformasına nispeten benzeyen kıyafetler giymiş onlarca insan tarafından kuşatılmış durumdasın. İmparatorluk çelik yeleklerini taklit eden ahşap plakalar, el dokuması kumaşların üzerine yerleştirilmiş. Bu kıyafetler; post, kemik, ağaç kabuğu ve dev bitki kalıntısı gibi sayısız ganimetle süslenmiş. Vahşiler, yaralarını ve kesik uzuvlarını sergilese de birçoğuna ilkel protezler takılmış. Zaman zaman gruptan birkaçı canavar misali dişlerini gösterirken diğerleri de gerginlikle silahlarını sıkıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你被数十人团团围住。他们身上的装束勉强还有点星界军制服的样子。粗布衣服外覆着木板，模仿着帝国的防弹护甲。这些衣物上挂着无数战利品：皮毛、兽骨、树皮，还有巨型植物的残骸。这些野蛮人肆意炫耀着自己的伤疤和残肢，不过不少人都装着简陋的义肢。人群中时而有人像野兽般龇牙咧嘴，而其他人则紧张地攥紧武器。{/n}
